channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. women’s hockey team dumps Trump, sets a date to celebrate gold medal with Flavor Flav in Las Vegas
item.description: The rapper reposted a note on X from sports media brand The GIST, announcing he’s hosting a “She Got Game” in partnership with the outlet and MGM Reso...

item.title: Moltbook: The conversation we should be having
item.description: In early February, the AI world found itself worked up over Moltbook, a social platform for AI agents to communicate and interact. These AI agents all...

item.title: We May Be Able to Spot Early Dementia Risk With One Simple Analysis, Study Says
item.description: Researchers found that speech patterns, like pauses and filler words, are tied to executive function.

item.title: Jack Dorsey makes a grim prediction about the future of work as he lays off 4,000 Block employees in AI push
item.description: Jack Dorsey, CEO of Block Inc, is not only laying off nearly half of the company’s workforce, but he wants investors to think he’s an AI -focused trai...

item.title: Archer Aviation and Starlink hope your first ride in an air taxi will include in-flight internet
item.description: Archer Aviation is installing Starlink on its Midnight electric air taxis, the company announced on February 27. The move, an industry first, will bri...

item.title: When It Comes to Employee Retention, Principles Beat Perks Every Time
item.description: Employee stickiness is built through intentional leadership, cultural consistency, and business fluency, not flashy benefits.

item.title: Two strategic priorities but limited resources?
item.description: Advice from 26 entrepreneurs on how to move forward.

item.title: Duolingo stock is falling off a cliff, continuing a dramatic collapse. You can’t just blame that ‘AI first’ memo
item.description: It’s a horrible day for investors in Duolingo. Shares of the language learning app with the green owl mascot are falling off a cliff after the company...

item.title: Exclusive: How Dr. Becky Kennedy built a leadership playbook for parenting—and a $34 million-a-year business
item.description: She's says today's parents want to improve their skills at home the same way they hone their management skills at work.

item.title: 3 Tips From Nomadic Founders for Building an Optimized Remote Workforce
item.description: Optimize your remote workforce to live a nomadic founder’s lifestyle without sacrificing company growth.

item.title: Jack Dorsey’s fintech company Block is laying off thousands, citing gains from AI
item.description: Shares in the financial technology company Block soared more than 20% in premarket trading Friday after its CEO announced it was laying off more than ...

item.title: American hockey star who plays in Canada’s capital rips White House for sharing AI-doctored TikTok video
item.description: Brady Tkachuk criticized the fabricated audio. “I’m not in control of any of those accounts. … I know that those words would never come out of my mout...

item.title: Here are the 7 rules of group chats, including how to leave when you’ve had enough
item.description: Rupert Wesson, a director at Debrett’s, the British etiquette guide, has tips on how to communicate.

item.title: Burger King tests OpenAI-powered headsets that will track the friendliness of drive-through workers
item.description: The system collects data on restaurant operations and shares it via “Patty,” a voice that talks to employees through their headsets.

item.title: A Founder’s ‘Under 26’ Hiring Post Got 3.1 Million Views, and Maybe a Lawsuit, Too
item.description: Telling the world you plan to use discriminatory hiring practices may not be the best legal strategy.

item.title: PPI data show wholesale prices rising sharply — a sign of persistent inflation
Cash App and Square maker Block’s stock is surging on AI job-cut bombshell
Economic calendar: Investors are gearing up for inflation and builder updates
This investment-firm founder made a 180-degree turn on AI after testing Claude
Stock-index futures take a turn for the worse after inflation data — follow live
